events.label: Supplies dwindling
events.narration: Snow piled chest-high against the larder door. The cook returns with less than promised and a face like an undertaker's.

events.label: Larder holds
events.narration: The reinforced larder rattles through another blizzard. Salt pork for everyone; for the first time this season, no one goes to bed hungry.

events.label: Lowmark market day
events.narration: First market of the thaw. Wool, salt, and rumour change hands; the fort's name comes up only twice, and both times approvingly.

events.label: Bandit scouts on the ridge
events.narration: A rider out of the hills, then another. They mark the watchposts and ride on. Whatever they wanted, they found it.

events.label: Quiet summer day
events.narration: Bees in the thatch and nothing on the road. The mercs drill, then nap, then drill again. It will not last.

events.label: Harvest tithes
events.narration: Hill villagers arrive with sacks of grain and a tally-stick. The fort takes its share and stamps the wood with the seal of the levy.

events.label: Smithy backlog cleared
events.narration: The smith works two nights running and the kit comes off the rack sharper than it went on. Coin clinks into the fort chest.
